name: Sign-Up Screen Elements Visibility
desc: Verify that Username, Email, Password, and Confirm Password fields are present on the Sign-Up screen.
steps:
1. Launch browser and load login page
2. Click 'Sign Up' tab/toggle
3. Verify presence of input fields and signup button
expected: All signup inputs and buttons are fully visible and enabled.

name: Register New Account
desc: Verify successful user registration with valid new credentials.
steps:
1. Go to signup screen
2. Enter new username, email, and matching password
3. Click Sign Up
expected: Account created successfully and redirected to Dashboard.

name: Register with Duplicate Email
desc: Verify registration fails when using an email that is already registered.
steps:
1. Go to signup screen
2. Enter existing email and other details
3. Click Sign Up
expected: Error message displayed: 'Email already in use'.

name: Register with Weak Password
desc: Verify validation warning for password shorter than 6 characters.
steps:
1. Go to signup screen
2. Enter password '123'
3. Click Sign Up
expected: Validation warning shows password must be at least 6 characters.

name: Register Password Mismatch
desc: Verify error when password and confirm password do not match.
steps:
1. Go to signup screen
2. Enter password 'Pass123' and confirm 'Pass321'
3. Click Sign Up
expected: Validation warning shows passwords do not match.

name: Register with Invalid Email Format
desc: Verify email format validation during user signup.
steps:
1. Go to signup screen
2. Enter email 'userexample.com'
3. Click Sign Up
expected: Error showing email address is invalid.

name: Login Screen Elements Visibility
desc: Verify that Email and Password inputs and Login button are present on the login tab.
steps:
1. Load auth screen
2. Choose login tab
3. Verify fields and button
expected: Login form elements are present and interactive.

name: Login with Valid Credentials
desc: Verify successful login using active credentials.
steps:
1. Load login page
2. Enter registered email and correct password
3. Click Login
expected: Redirected to Dashboard screen; username is visible.

name: Login with Incorrect Password
desc: Verify error message when entering an incorrect password.
steps:
1. Enter correct email
2. Enter incorrect password
3. Click Login
expected: Error banner/toast displays 'Invalid email or password'.

name: Login with Non-existent Account
desc: Verify error message when logging in with unregistered email.
steps:
1. Enter random unregistered email
2. Enter password
3. Click Login
expected: Error banner/toast displays 'No user record found'.

name: Login - Empty Input Fields
desc: Verify validation triggers when login fields are blank.
steps:
1. Leave email and password blank
2. Click Login
expected: Validation warning indicates fields cannot be empty.

name: Admin Account Specific Redirection
desc: Verify admin credentials login redirects to Admin Control Portal instead of dashboard.
steps:
1. Enter admin123@gmail.com
2. Enter admin password
3. Click Login
expected: User is redirected to the full-screen Admin Control Portal.

name: Admin Password Override Support
desc: Verify that typing 'admin' for admin email internally converts password for Firebase requirements.
steps:
1. Enter admin123@gmail.com
2. Enter password 'admin'
3. Click Login
expected: Firebase successfully logs in with overridden password.

name: Logout Redirect Flow
desc: Verify logout button logs user out and clears state.
steps:
1. Open sidebar menu
2. Click Logout button
3. Confirm redirections
expected: User is logged out and returned to Auth Screen.

name: Auth Guard Redirection for Guests
desc: Verify that guests trying to access internal routes are auto-redirected to Auth.
steps:
1. Clear local storage / cookies
2. Direct browse to http://localhost:5173/dashboard
3. Verify page location
expected: Guest is redirected back to login screen.

name: Sidebar Menu Expansion and Layout
desc: Verify sidebar expands and shows logo, navigation links, and active user stats.
steps:
1. Look at left sidebar
2. Check for menu item icons and text labels
expected: All navigation options (Dashboard, Courses, Practice, Assessment, Planner, Chat, Leaderboard, Settings, Profile) are listed.

name: Dashboard Quick Stats Loading
desc: Verify dashboard displays statistics cards (Streak, XP, Hours, Completed Courses).
steps:
1. Navigate to Dashboard
2. Verify the 4 stats metrics cards are present
expected: Stats containers render and load live numbers from user profile.

name: Quick Access 'Courses' Navigation
desc: Verify clicking the 'Courses' card on the Dashboard changes tab to Courses.
steps:
1. Click 'Courses' quick access card
2. Verify URL/Tab state
expected: Active tab changes to Courses successfully.

name: Quick Access 'Practice' Navigation
desc: Verify clicking the 'Practice' card on the Dashboard redirects to Practice tab.
steps:
1. Click 'Practice' quick access card on dashboard
2. Verify tab changes to Practice
expected: Active tab transitions to Practice (not Courses).

name: Quick Access 'Planner' Navigation
desc: Verify clicking the 'Planner' card on the Dashboard navigates to Study Planner.
steps:
1. Click 'Study Planner' quick access card
2. Verify active tab is Planner
expected: Active tab updates to Planner.

name: AI Study Buddy Widget Display
desc: Verify AI Study Buddy preview pane renders on the Dashboard.
steps:
1. Go to Dashboard
2. Scroll to AI Study Buddy pane
3. Check input placeholder
expected: Widget displays with title, short AI intro, and query box.

name: Dynamic Greeting Messages
desc: Verify that dashboard greeting changes depending on the time of day (Morning/Afternoon/Evening).
steps: 1. Check greeting message text on top header
expected: Greeting contains 'Good Morning', 'Good Afternoon', or 'Good Evening' based on system clock.

name: Recent Activities Panel Content
desc: Verify recent activities timeline shows user's latest task completions.
steps:
1. View Recent Activities section on dashboard
2. Check for chronological order list items
expected: Activities display correctly with icons and timestamps.

name: Responsive Mobile View Sidebar Trigger
desc: Verify sidebar collapses to hamburger toggle on screen resize.
steps:
1. Resize window width to under 768px
2. Verify sidebar hides
3. Click hamburger icon in top header
expected: Sidebar drawer opens overlaying the main content.

name: Theme Toggle Persistence
desc: Verify toggling Dark Mode changes global class styling.
steps:
1. Go to Settings
2. Click Theme toggle
3. Verify background colors transition
expected: Dark class added/removed from HTML/body container.

name: Available Courses Cards Rendering
desc: Verify that all catalog courses render inside the courses tab.
steps:
1. Go to Courses tab
2. Count course cards available
expected: At least 3 core courses (e.g. Kotlin, Java, Web Development) are loaded.

name: Course Card Basic Stats
desc: Verify course card metadata is displayed: duration, level, lessons count.
steps:
1. Open Courses tab
2. Inspect Java course card text fields
expected: Card displays duration (e.g. '8 weeks') and rating / level badges.

name: Enrollment Toggle Status - Unenrolled
desc: Verify course shows 'Enroll Now' button initially when not joined.
steps:
1. Select unenrolled course card
2. Check button text label
expected: Action button reads 'Enroll Now'.

name: Enrollment Success Flow
desc: Verify user can enroll in a course successfully.
steps:
1. Click 'Enroll Now' on Kotlin course
2. Wait for state change
expected: Enrollment transitions, button changes to 'Start Learning', and subcollection updates.

name: Enrollment Action - Start Learning Action
desc: Verify 'Start Learning' redirects user to the learning module details page.
steps:
1. Click 'Start Learning' on enrolled course
2. Check if syllabus and topic list are shown
expected: TopicList component loads with course details and lessons hierarchy.

name: Reject Enrollment Flow
desc: Verify that clicking 'Reject' / Unenroll option removes the enrollment state.
steps:
1. Click 'Unenroll' / 'Reject' on enrolled course card
2. Confirm warning dialog
expected: Course is unenrolled; action button reverts to 'Enroll Now'.

name: Course Detail Screen Details Verification
desc: Verify clicking details option loads course summary overview.
steps:
1. Click 'Details' on Java course card
2. Verify syllabus outline headers render
expected: Course syllabus, milestones, and prerequisites list are displayed.

name: Syllabus Accordion Toggles
desc: Verify that syllabus section headers expand and collapse details.
steps:
1. Click on Course Module 1 header
2. Verify sub-items list
3. Click again to close
expected: Accordions animate open and close respectively.

name: Difficulty Level Tags Filter
desc: Verify course list filters by level tags (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced).
steps:
1. Select 'Intermediate' difficulty filter
2. Verify catalog course cards
expected: Only courses labeled Intermediate are shown in grid list.

name: Search Course Filter Input
desc: Verify search input filters the courses list dynamically by matching string.
steps:
1. Focus search bar in Courses header
2. Type 'Kotlin'
3. Observe card results
expected: Only Kotlin course card is shown in the catalog list.

name: Progress Tracker Updates
desc: Verify course card progress bar shows correct percentage completed.
steps:
1. Check Kotlin course progress percentage
2. Finish one subtopic
3. Re-check progress bar value
expected: Progress percentage increments accurately based on subtopic counts.

name: Syllabus Lesson Duration Stats
desc: Verify each lesson item displays duration estimation badge.
steps:
1. Inside Java details list
2. Verify each topic has a duration label (e.g. '15 mins')
expected: Duration labels are correctly rendered for all syllabus modules.

name: Detail Subtopics - Start Topic Button
desc: Verify that clicking a syllabus subtopic loads the TopicLearn container screen.
steps:
1. Expand a syllabus module
2. Click on 'Introduction to OOP' topic
3. Verify learning pane is active
expected: Learning container tab is loaded with specific topic content.

name: Empty Search Results UI state
desc: Verify placeholder layout displays when course search yields no matches.
steps:
1. Enter 'Quantum Computing' in search bar
2. Look at catalog container
expected: Displays 'No courses found matching your query' illustration.

name: Return to Courses Catalog Link
desc: Verify back button on Course Details screen returns to Courses grid catalog.
steps:
1. Open Java Course Details screen
2. Click '< Back to Courses' header link
3. Check main container
expected: Catalog list view is restored.

name: Topic Learn Layout Renders
desc: Verify learning interface layout split panel (Content display, Navigation sidebar).
steps:
1. Go to TopicLearn screen
2. Verify presence of study material tab headers
expected: Tab bar showing AI Notes, Lectures, Breakdown, Q&A is visible.

name: Video Lecture Playlist Loading
desc: Verify clicking 'Video Lectures' tab loads YouTube playlist grid.
steps:
1. Click 'Lectures' tab
2. Inspect for video lesson card items
expected: A grid list of video playlists related to current topic is loaded.

name: YouTube Redirect Navigation
desc: Verify clicking a video item card opens YouTube search with context query parameters.
steps:
1. Click on a lecture video card
2. Track browser handles for new tab creation
expected: A new tab is opened loading youtube.com/results?search_query=...

name: AI Study Notes Generation
desc: Verify 'AI Notes' tab prints tailored learning text content.
steps:
1. Click 'AI Notes' tab header
2. Check readability of markdown formatting
expected: Tailored study notes are generated/retrieved and presented cleanly.

name: Smart Breakdown Trigger
desc: Verify AI Smart Breakdown generates micro-summaries.
steps:
1. Click 'Breakdown' tab
2. Verify list of key takeaways, analogies, and code snippets
expected: Summarized cards populate the Breakdown dashboard.

name: Interactive Q&A Expansion Accordions
desc: Verify FAQ/Q&A tab displays expandable query cards.
steps:
1. Click 'Q&A' tab
2. Click on first question card
3. Verify answer expansion
expected: Answer card drops down revealing explanations.

name: Mark Topic Completed State Sync
desc: Verify checking topic progress complete button updates db and visual checkbox.
steps:
1. Toggle 'Mark Completed' switch button
2. Check progress statistics update
expected: Button toggles to Completed state; streak XP updates.

name: Code Snippet Copy Trigger
desc: Verify clicking 'Copy' button on notes code blocks copies block code to clipboard.
steps:
1. Locate code snippet in AI notes
2. Click copy button overlay
3. Paste into variable check
expected: Monospace code block content exists in system clipboard.

name: Feedback Upvote/Downvote Interaction
desc: Verify liking/disliking AI response updates thumbs state.
steps:
1. Click Thumbs Up button in chatbot notes pane
2. Verify icon highlight state changes
expected: Icon highlights blue/active status instantly.

name: Topic Next Navigation Redirect
desc: Verify clicking 'Next Topic' button loads next sequential unit.
steps:
1. Click 'Next Lesson' footer navigation control
2. Check active topic title
expected: Next lesson content loads; sidebar highlighted row updates.

name: Topic Previous Navigation Redirect
desc: Verify clicking 'Previous Topic' button loads previous sequential unit.
steps:
1. Click 'Previous Lesson' footer navigation control
2. Check active topic title
expected: Previous lesson content loads successfully.

name: Topic Notes PDF Export Option
desc: Verify print/pdf export triggers system preview option.
steps:
1. Click Print PDF icon in notes header
2. Check for browser print window handle trigger
expected: Print system dialog opens containing styled summary document.

name: Video Hover Playback Hint Overlay
desc: Verify video item card shows play icon overlay on mouse hover.
steps:
1. Hover mouse pointer over video lesson card
2. Inspect overlay elements visibility
expected: Play icon overlay fades in with transition effect.

name: AI Content Regeneration Loader
desc: Verify clicking regenerate icon shows loading skeleton spinner.
steps:
1. Click 'Regenerate explanation'
2. Look at text content region
expected: A shimmering grey layout skeleton is visible during API query.

name: Back To Syllabus Overview Link
desc: Verify clicking back to syllabus returns user to the Course Details list.
steps:
1. Click 'Back to Course Details'
2. Check page container contents
expected: Syllabus outline view is displayed.

name: Assessment Selection Lobby Display
desc: Verify available exams listing shows title, questions counts, duration, and status.
steps:
1. Go to Assessment tab
2. Verify the list of available exams is populated
expected: Exams list contains items like Java assessment, WebDev assessment, Kotlin test.

name: Lobby Exam Status Indicator
desc: Verify exams show 'Completed' badge or 'Start Exam' button dynamically.
steps: 1. Verify assessment action button state for newly registered user
expected: Unfinished exams show 'Start Exam' button.

name: Lobby Attempt History Display
desc: Verify best attempt scores are displayed in details.
steps:
1. Check exam card subtext
2. Check for Score / High score representation
expected: Score indicator details are visible (e.g. 'Best Score: 85%').

name: Start Exam Instructions Dialog
desc: Verify clicking Start Exam opens warning dialog outlining guidelines.
steps:
1. Click 'Start Exam' on Kotlin assessment
2. Check modal popup visibility
expected: Modal displays details: 50 Questions, 30 Minutes, AI Grading.

name: Exam Setup - Question Count Validation
desc: Verify that exactly 50 test questions are loaded.
steps:
1. Click 'Accept & Start' in instruction dialog
2. Inspect test page container questions index
expected: Questions list or page shows exactly 50 MCQ questions.

name: Exam Setup - Timer Initialization
desc: Verify test timer starts ticking down from 30:00.
steps:
1. Start exam
2. Check countdown timer element on header
3. Wait 2 seconds
expected: Timer displays '30:00' initially and decreases dynamically.

name: Timer Format Representation
desc: Verify timer text updates in MM:SS digital countdown format.
steps:
1. Read timer element string value
2. Confirm match pattern
expected: Matches expression regex `^[0-2]?[0-9]:[0-5][0-9]$`.

name: MCQ Option Select Value Sync
desc: Verify clicking option radio highlights item and stores answer key index.
steps:
1. Go to question 1
2. Click option 'B'
3. Verify radio button state
expected: Radio button option 'B' is checked.

name: MCQ Option Deselect/Change Ability
desc: Verify user can change their answer selection before submitting.
steps:
1. Go to question 1
2. Click option 'A'
3. Click option 'C'
4. Verify active checked radio
expected: Checked radio updates to option 'C'; option 'A' is unchecked.

name: Multiple Choice Multi-Page Pagination
desc: Verify user can navigate pages when MCQs are paginated.
steps:
1. Scroll to page navigation footer
2. Click 'Next Page' / 'Page 2'
3. Observe question items
expected: Displays questions 11-20 (page size 10) correctly.

name: Progress Tracker Percentage Calculation
desc: Verify progress bar computes percentage of answered questions.
steps:
1. Answer 5 questions out of 50
2. Inspect test progress bar value
expected: Progress bar reads 10% completed.

name: Lobby Progress Badge Update On Load
desc: Verify progress is persistent on reload if exam is saved.
steps:
1. Select answers for 3 questions
2. Refresh browser page
3. Confirm selected answers persist
expected: Answer states are successfully re-loaded from local/db state.

name: Finish Exam Confirmation Modal
desc: Verify clicking Submit Exam triggers validation confirmation popup dialog.
steps:
1. Click 'Submit Assessment' button
2. Verify modal content warning
expected: Confirmation warning shows total answered and asks if sure to finalize.

name: Automatic Submission on Timeout
desc: Verify that when the timer hits 00:00, the exam submits automatically.
steps:
1. Inject test state with timer '00:01'
2. Wait 2 seconds
3. Observe screen state
expected: System auto-locks input and processes exam submission immediately.

name: Test Scoring Calculation Accuracy
desc: Verify score reports right percentage of correct/incorrect questions.
steps:
1. Complete exam with known answers (e.g. 40 correct, 10 wrong)
2. Submit exam
3. Check score dashboard
expected: Result shows Score: 80% (40/50 Correct Answers).

name: Pass/Fail Threshold Validation
desc: Verify passing score (>=60%) displays a Green Pass banner.
steps:
1. Finish exam with score 70%
2. Check result card theme styles
expected: Displays green check badge and reads 'Passed' title.

name: Fail Outcome Theme Validation
desc: Verify failing score (<60%) displays a Red Fail badge.
steps:
1. Finish exam with score 45%
2. Check result card styling
expected: Displays red cross alert warning and reads 'Failed' title.

name: AI Analytical Feedback Generation
desc: Verify Gemini API generates detailed analytical feedback on completion.
steps:
1. Submit exam
2. Wait for AI analysis output card loading
expected: An analytical study review details key weak areas and topic recommendations.

name: Firestore Test Attempt Logging
desc: Verify test attempt results log successfully into Firebase collection.
steps:
1. Complete assessment
2. Open Student Profile
3. Locate Exam History table list
expected: New entry is added showing exam title, date, and score matching test.

name: Return to Assessment Center Link
desc: Verify back link on result page returns user to Assessment Hub.
steps:
1. Click 'Back to Assessment Center' on results screen
2. Check active panel view
expected: User is returned to the original Assessment exam list page.

name: Practice Home Page Catalog Loads
desc: Verify practice tab shows list of practice modules (static MCQ sets, code sandboxes).
steps:
1. Open Practice tab
2. Verify presence of practice module options list
expected: Grid showing MCQ challenges and interactive code editors is shown.

name: Coding Sandbox Workspace Visibility
desc: Verify Coding Sandbox panel split screen elements (Instructions, Code Editor, Console Output).
steps:
1. Click 'Launch Coding Sandbox'
2. Verify the 3 workspaces divisions are visible
expected: Left panel shows markdown task, middle is editor text area, right is dark console screen.

name: Coding Sandbox Input Typing
desc: Verify text editor accepts characters typing key events.
steps:
1. Click inside editor textarea
2. Type 'class Main { public static void main(String[] args) {} }'
3. Check input text content
expected: Text area value updates to match typed characters.

name: Coding Sandbox Compiler Run Trigger
desc: Verify clicking 'Run Code' compiles and yields output in mock console.
steps:
1. Enter syntax correct print script
2. Click 'Run Code' button
3. Monitor console loading spinner
expected: Console panel prints expected execution outputs (e.g. 'Hello, World!').

name: Coding Sandbox Error Stream Output
desc: Verify compiler handles and prints code compile syntax errors in console.
steps:
1. Input broken java code lacking semicolons
2. Click 'Run Code'
3. Inspect console output text
expected: Console output displays build/runtime errors in red text.

name: AI Grader Feedback Trigger
desc: Verify clicking 'Submit to AI Grader' queries AI for code evaluation.
steps:
1. Write code solution
2. Click 'Submit to AI Grader'
3. Wait for grading popup result card
expected: Evaluation modal opens with AI score, code structure review, and tip blocks.

name: AI Grader Score Representation
desc: Verify AI Grader displays score rating (e.g. 85/100) dynamically.
steps:
1. Inspect grader modal elements
2. Read score text value
expected: Numerical grader score out of 100 is visible.

name: Coding Sandbox Instructions Accordion Toggle
desc: Verify instructions card collapses to maximize code editor viewport.
steps:
1. Click toggle instructions arrow icon
2. Verify dimensions width of editor container panel
expected: Instructions panel collapses and editor panel expands width.

name: Coding Sandbox Console Clean Option
desc: Verify console clear icon wipes current console stream inputs clean.
steps:
1. Confirm text presence in console log pane
2. Click trashcan 'Clear' icon
3. Re-inspect console
expected: Console panel text area is emptied.

name: Coding Practice MCQ Mode Selection
desc: Verify selecting MCQ mode opens 10 quick-practice questions list.
steps:
1. Go to Practice home
2. Click 'MCQ Practice Mode'
3. Verify practice challenge loads
expected: An active MCQ challenge loads with 10 questions and next indicators.

name: Practice MCQ Instant Feedback Dialog
desc: Verify checking answer displays green/red highlight indicators instantly.
steps:
1. Select correct option button
2. Observe indicator borders color
expected: Green outline highlight on correct option, with explanation text banner.

name: Incorrect Practice MCQ Response
desc: Verify choosing incorrect option highlights correct alternative.
steps:
1. Select incorrect option button
2. Verify option borders
expected: Incorrect option highlights red, and correct option highlights green.

name: Practice XP Accrual Tracker
desc: Verify correct answer in practice increments user's XP score.
steps:
1. Read initial XP value on sidebar
2. Complete a practice question correctly
3. Confirm updated XP value is higher
expected: XP counter incremented by 10 points.

name: Practice Session Summary Dashboard
desc: Verify completing 10 practice questions shows results summary.
steps:
1. Answer question 10
2. Click Finish Practice
3. Observe card
expected: A summary board showing XP gained, accuracy percentage, and review questions is loaded.

name: Exit Practice Workspace Action
desc: Verify close button redirects user back to Practice catalog overview.
steps:
1. Click exit 'x' icon on header
2. Check screen components state
expected: Main Practice menu catalog is displayed.

name: Study Planner Tab Interface Renders
desc: Verify Study Planner form controls (Weekly Goal, Daily Hours, Focus Topics, Create Plan Button).
steps:
1. Open Study Planner tab
2. Verify input fields and dropdown menus render
expected: Form fields are active and labeled.

name: Create Study Plan - Validation
desc: Verify input validation prevents submitting blank planner forms.
steps:
1. Leave inputs blank
2. Click 'Generate AI Plan'
expected: Form validator raises error 'Fields cannot be empty'.

name: AI Study Plan Generation Flow
desc: Verify entering goals and hours successfully generates schedule items.
steps:
1. Enter goal 'Learn Java collections'
2. Enter daily hours '3'
3. Click 'Generate AI Plan'
4. Wait for processing
expected: Planner updates, and a list of scheduled days appears.

name: Plan Detail Days Accordion
desc: Verify that plan items expand to show detailed checklist sub-tasks.
steps:
1. Open generated plan
2. Click on 'Day 1: Basics'
3. Check subtasks list visibility
expected: Subtasks checklists open inside Day 1 card.

name: Checkbox Subtask Complete Toggle
desc: Verify clicking plan checklist checkbox marks task done and updates progress percentage.
steps:
1. Expand plan day 1
2. Click checkbox on task 'Read syntax guide'
3. Observe progress percentage indicator
expected: Task has line-through text style and progress indicator increments.

name: Study Planner List History
desc: Verify user can see their previous active plans listed.
steps:
1. Reload Planner tab
2. Inspect left-hand 'My Plans' directory side pane
expected: All previously generated study schedules are loaded.

name: Delete Study Plan Flow
desc: Verify clicking delete plan removes item from history list.
steps:
1. Click trashcan icon next to plan name in sidebar
2. Confirm delete dialog
expected: Plan is removed from history list and Firestore references deleted.

name: Study Progress Bar Visual Sync
desc: Verify that complete percentage increments visually.
steps:
1. Complete 50% checklist items
2. Inspect plan progress circular/linear graph indicator
expected: Progress bar fill fills to exactly half length.

name: Generate Plan Hours Limits Validation
desc: Verify validation bounds for daily hours range (1 to 24).
steps:
1. Enter '25' hours
2. Click generate
expected: Validation warning shows 'Hours must be between 1 and 24'.

name: Weekly Goal Length Bounds Verification
desc: Verify warning when weekly goal character length is insufficient.
steps:
1. Enter single character 'A'
2. Click generate
expected: Validation warning shows goal must be more detailed.

name: Study Day Complete Status Visuals
desc: Verify that completing all daily subtasks highlights the day card green.
steps:
1. Click all checklists checkboxes for Day 1
2. Look at Day 1 header background style
expected: Card color shifts to light green with check icon indicator.

name: Active Plan Switcher Interaction
desc: Verify clicking a history plan card updates workspace to that plan context.
steps:
1. Select Plan 'Learn Java' from sidebar list
2. Click Plan 'WebDev' from list
3. Verify main title
expected: Main workspace switches context showing WebDev checklist details.

name: Custom Task Add Option
desc: Verify user can add custom subtasks to a daily plan.
steps:
1. Click '+ Add Custom Task' button on Day 1
2. Enter name 'Solve hackerrank'
3. Click Save
expected: New checklist item is appended to Day 1 task items list.

name: Edit Study Plan Goal Description
desc: Verify user can edit plan metadata after creation.
steps:
1. Click pencil edit icon next to plan title
2. Edit name
3. Click Save
expected: Header title changes update immediately.

name: Study Planner Empty History State UI
desc: Verify fallback screen displays when user has no active study plans.
steps:
1. Clear database plans collection
2. Navigate to Planner tab
3. Check main panel
expected: Displays 'You have no active plans. Create one with AI to get started!' prompt.

name: Leaderboard User Rows Load
desc: Verify Leaderboard lists rank, profile pictures, names, and XP scores.
steps:
1. Navigate to Leaderboard tab
2. Verify list displays multiple users rows
expected: Table lists rows showing student ranks and XP details.

name: Leaderboard Tab Switcher - Weekly/All-Time
desc: Verify clicking Weekly or All-Time tabs updates leaderboard list.
steps:
1. Click 'Weekly' tab
2. Click 'All-Time' tab
3. Verify ranks values updates
expected: List transitions showing different sorting details.

name: Search User on Leaderboard
desc: Verify typing a name in leaderboard search filters lists elements.
steps:
1. Enter 'Vishwa' in leaderboard search bar
2. Inspect student rows visibility
expected: Only user rows matching query name 'Vishwa' are shown.

name: Weekly Rank Sort Sequence Verification
desc: Verify users ranks are ordered sequentially by highest XP values desc.
steps:
1. Read XP levels from rank 1 to rank 5
2. Confirm rank 1 XP >= rank 2 XP
expected: XP scores are ordered in descending sequence.

name: Tapping User Renders Overview Dialog
desc: Verify clicking user row opens modal with detailed public student stats card.
steps:
1. Click user row for 'Vishwa'
2. Inspect overview modal presence
expected: Displays user card details: Joined date, XP milestones, exams passed.

name: User Profile Screen Elements
desc: Verify profile displays avatar, name, major course field, and student statistics dashboard.
steps:
1. Open Profile tab
2. Verify the presence of stat cards (Enrolled, Exams, Avg Score, XP)
expected: Student stats grid loads with numbers matching user collection.

name: Average Exam Score Computation Validation
desc: Verify that average score on profile matches calculations of logged exams.
steps:
1. Count exam history scores (e.g. 80%, 90%)
2. Compare average to Avg Score card (85%)
expected: Average stats card displays average calculations.

name: Edit Profile Modal Trigger
desc: Verify clicking 'Edit Profile' button opens fields editing dialog.
steps:
1. Click 'Edit Profile' button on Profile page
2. Verify presence of editable text boxes
expected: Modal opens containing fields: Name, Course, Mobile Number.

name: Profile Details Save Action Persistence
desc: Verify saving changes updates profile dashboard UI and database values.
steps:
1. Open Edit Profile modal
2. Change name to 'Vishwa Smart'
3. Click Save
4. Confirm profile title text
expected: Updated name is displayed immediately; database doc is updated.

name: Cancel Edit Profile Dialog Option
desc: Verify clicking cancel/close does not save field modifications.
steps:
1. Open Edit Profile modal
2. Change name to 'Unsaved Name'
3. Click 'Cancel'
4. Verify profile name title
expected: Modal closes; original profile name persists.

name: Enrolled Course List Cards Link
desc: Verify that list of enrolled courses renders inside profile cards list.
steps:
1. Scroll down to Enrolled Courses section on Profile
2. Check for enrolled course cards
expected: Cards representing courses currently enrolled in are visible.

name: Exam History Log Table Renders
desc: Verify that exam attempts log list lists attempts chronologically.
steps:
1. View Exam History table on Profile
2. Check columns: Attempt #, Title, Date, Score, Result
expected: List represents correct history logs details matching database.

name: Exam History Status Colors
desc: Verify pass attempts show green badges and failures show red badges in history list.
steps: 1. Look at Score/Result column labels colors
expected: Pass items have green text/badges; Fail items have red labels.

name: Avatar Selection Grid Modal Display
desc: Verify avatar edit shows selection grid of preset icons.
steps:
1. Click avatar image picker
2. Verify popup display options
expected: Grid of select profile preset icons loads successfully.

name: Settings Notifications Toggle Switch
desc: Verify settings tab toggles notifications checkbox state.
steps:
1. Go to Settings tab
2. Toggle notifications switch
3. Verify change in check state
expected: Switch updates visually and config state updates.
